title: Photographer loses 20–30% of clients to spam — needs an AI clone with a copy of her voice to answer calls and book sessions.
Need a smart device that automatically detects pigeons and permanently deters them. Everything on the market only works temporarily.
Voice control for AI coding breaks when I change my mind mid-sentence. Need an AI intermediary that cleans up prompts through conversation before sending.
Daily sales calls lost because prospects can't understand my technical product. Need an AI assistant that helps explain and handle objections in real time.
Nigeria's transport trap: Uber/Bolt too expensive, buses unreliable. Need a platform for verified shared rides along fixed routes.
Micro-influencer cannot monetize a loyal audience through personal merch due to high production costs and lack of logistics
Global problem: Dating apps fail for complex requirements — no platform lets you combine multiple criteria (religion, interests, location, lifestyle) into a truly personalized match.
An African entrepreneur cannot accept international payments easily, cheaply, and legally — existing solutions are slow, expensive, or blocked.
Daily routine after every client meeting — an entrepreneur manually creates a deal in CRM, writes a summary, and sends a follow-up email. Need an AI that does this automatically.
A startup founder loses focus and productive time every day due to scattered tasks. Needs a personal AI assistant that consolidates all apps, manages the schedule, and keeps them in flow.
A self-taught developer loses months building the wrong things because there's no curated, practical roadmap. Existing resources are fragmented, outdated, or too academic.
Immigrants lack an AI service for finding familiar and verified places (pharmacies, doctors, banks) in a new country, causing daily stress and time loss
Startup founders get lost in legal, accounting, and administrative tasks after incorporation, leading to stress and risks due to the lack of a clear, step-by-step plan
A 12-year-old girl wants to learn programming through game development but can't find an age-appropriate platform that teaches real coding concepts while being fun enough to keep her engaged
Fans of paper planners lack an iPad app that would allow importing PDF layout templates and using them as a foundation for digital notes
Problem Analysis: Owners of small B2B businesses cannot build a growth system. Do they need a fractional CMO, or can a SaaS be built?
Search for a controlled and stable channel for attracting clients to a banquet hall, as an alternative to unpredictable social media advertising
Marketing directors and founders have nowhere to find verified contractors (targeting specialists, SMM managers) — the existing search process is a lottery that wastes time and budget
It's impossible to donate to animal shelters due to complete distrust in charity fundraisers. There is no service with guaranteed transparency and audit
Aviation safety expert seeks a technical co-founder to develop an AI solution that prevents daily bird strikes, a $1.2B/year industry problem affecting global aviation safety

Patients with chronic diseases get the same generic advice from doctors during short visits — no tools exist to translate their unique daily data (glucose, sleep, diet) into personalized, actionable plans.
A non-technical founder spent weeks trying to create a simple product demo and still ended up with something that looked unprofessional.
Startups in Russia struggle with finding mentors and knowledge in English — both for learning and international expansion
An indie hacker earning less than $5K/month can't afford a personal marketing team — yet needs professional-level content, SEO, and distribution to grow.
SEO is dead for small websites. Google prioritizes big brands and AI-generated results, making organic traffic nearly impossible for indie creators and small businesses.
Frequent travelers need a travel SIM/eSIM that works seamlessly across multiple countries without overpaying, dealing with local carriers, or losing their home number.
There's no personalized real estate search tool that aggregates listings from all platforms and matches them to a buyer's unique criteria, lifestyle needs, and financial constraints.
It's difficult for parents of newborns in India to organize vaccination: there is no service for easy doctor search and a «turnkey» process provision
Courier app navigation and grouping issues in «Vozy Ozon»
Need a service for generating names and instantly checking domain availability
Need for a service to package website deliveries professionally
Startup founders have nowhere to order quality, in-depth research on specific projects or niches — existing services provide superficial and unreliable reports
Young people in India face dead-end career guidance — existing tools give generic advice, no one maps their unique skills to real opportunities with a step-by-step plan.
Calorie tracking is broken: current apps are tedious, inaccurate, and unsustainable. Need a passive solution that logs nutrition without manual effort.
Psychology students and early-career therapists struggle to practice diagnostic skills — there's no safe, realistic simulation tool for clinical interviews.
Filipino farmers can't get fair prices — middlemen take 30-50%, and no platform connects them directly to buyers.
A non-technical startup founder wastes weeks evaluating dev agencies, only to hire one that delivers poor code. There's no reliable way to verify technical competence before signing a contract.
The 'cold start' problem in influencer marketing for e-commerce: Brands waste budgets on wrong influencers while good micro-influencers can't find brand deals.
Difficulty of finding relevant business events and building meaningful connections through networking.
Home sellers in the US get stuck between expensive agents (5-6% fees) and complex FSBO (For Sale By Owner) — no tool guides them step-by-step through selling a home without an agent.
Tourists want authentic local food — but restaurant apps show tourist traps, and local spots have no digital presence. Need a way to discover what locals actually eat.
Real estate agents spend 2-3 hours writing each property listing. Need an AI tool that instantly generates professional, localized descriptions from property data.
Anyone buying a used car faces the same nightmare — hidden problems, shady dealers, and no reliable way to verify history. Existing services give incomplete data.
A founder's health is declining from burnout and sedentary lifestyle while running a startup — existing wellness apps don't account for the unpredictable, high-stress founder lifestyle.
Remote freelancers in developing countries can't access affordable coworking spaces — local options are either too expensive, too far, or non-existent.
AI startup founders spend weeks writing grant applications and investor decks. There's no tool that auto-generates funding documents from a startup's existing data.

A Telegram channel owner is losing their audience without understanding the reasons. They need an AI-based analytics tool that not only provides metrics but also explains them and suggests ideas for improving content.
An indie hacker spends 20-30 hours manually «cold launching» each new product in communities, emails, and social media. Needs an AI agent that automates the first 48 hours of launch distribution.
Website owners constantly need minor edits in the admin panel. They are forced to either pay a developer or struggle with a complicated CMS every time.
Republished: There is no app for Nigerian passengers that shows the real-time flight status of local airlines, leading to wasted time and money at the airport.
Constantly forgetting minor tasks due to the impulsive habit of «swiping» reminders away. Need a way to manage small tasks that survives the habit of instant dismissal.
It's impossible to order truly fresh farm vegetables and bread through delivery services. Even premium platforms deliver factory-made products labeled as 'farm' goods.
Online clothes shopping is a lottery. There's no accessible technology to see how a garment will actually look on your body type before buying.
Need an AI «Jarvis» that turns chaotic voice/text updates into automatically structured reports, meeting notes, and action items — without manual editing.
A musician in India can't find a simple, localized tool to manage bookings, payments, and client communication — global tools are too complex and expensive for the local market.
Therapists spend hours writing clinical notes after sessions — no HIPAA-compliant AI tool automatically turns session recordings into structured therapy notes.
Parents can't find trusted, affordable childcare on short notice — existing apps have inconsistent vetting, no real-time availability, and aren't designed for last-minute bookings.
Freelancers and remote workers waste hours tracking time, sending invoices, and chasing payments. No single tool automates the full cycle from work → invoice → payment.
Non-native English speakers waste time and mental energy manually proofreading professional communication. Existing AI tools don't adapt to personal style or professional context.
EV owners can't plan road trips confidently — charging apps show wrong availability, incompatible connectors, and unreliable stations. No single tool solves the full journey.
Startup teams have nowhere to find relevant custdev participants (people for interviews) to test early ideas and prototypes without overpaying for biased feedback
No device allows a 4-year-old child to independently stream music to a speaker over Wi-Fi without using a phone, tablet, or increasing screen time
Indie developers have nowhere to cheaply and effectively find the first 50-100 active users to test new niche products.
An expat in Germany is lost in the health insurance system — doesn't know which type of insurance to choose, gets conflicting advice, and can't assess long-term risks.
Lack of a clear, structured plan for integrating into German society after relocating — language, documents, job search, and social connections are not combined in any one service.
A designer wastes time by manually selecting and sorting references for mood boards — there's no AI tool that clusters images by visual style, color palette, or composition.
European HR professionals spend 3–5 hours per hire navigating fragmented and contradictory labor law requirements across EU jurisdictions.
People can't split restaurant bills fairly when orders differ in cost — existing apps require everyone to download them and still don't handle shared items properly.
Product teams waste weeks building features no one wants — there's no lightweight tool that validates user demand before writing a single line of code.
Travellers have nowhere to rent tested and verified outdoor gear for trips — existing rental services have poor inventory, no quality guarantees, and complex logistics.
Automation of resume filling for recruiters — saving 40-60 minutes on each candidate
Protection against fraudulent schemes in trading and cryptocurrency investments
Search for an effective cleaning business management solution
Can't start a photography and videography business due to lack of clients and systematic approach
Finding buyers in the UK for Nigerian food products for export
High translation costs for educational courses force creators to stay in one language, losing 80%+ of potential global audience
In Russia, working as a freelance designer is highly insecure: clients disappear without paying, and legal protection is nearly impossible
Parents feel helpless when their children show signs of depression or anxiety — there's no tool that helps families navigate youth mental health together
IT professionals are overwhelmed managing multiple AI subscriptions and tools — there's no unified platform to replace scattered AI services
When children fall ill in Russia, parents can't find reliable emergency dental care — current services are unreachable, unvetted, or lack child-appropriate care
Parents who value education can't find a reliable and curated list of the best schools in their area — existing reviews are biased, fragmented, and don't reflect real academic performance.
Developing a scalable solution for converting plastic waste into useful fuel in underserved communities
Recruiters have no way to truly verify a developer's skills — resumes are unreliable, interviews test the wrong things, and coding assessments are easily gamed.
A developer wastes hours debugging production issues across scattered logs, traces, and dashboards — there's no AI co-pilot that correlates signals and pinpoints root causes.
Small restaurant owners in developing countries lose 15-25% of revenue to food waste because they can't predict daily demand, and existing tools are too complex and expensive for them.
Landlords with 3-20 rental units waste 10+ hours/week on manual management — existing property management software is built for large portfolios and too complex for small operators.
Searching for a privacy-oriented personal AI assistant that can work with local data, schedule events, and manage tasks without sending data to third-party servers.
Sports bettors in Africa waste time manually comparing odds — no local tool aggregates bookmakers, tracks line movements, or offers real-time value alerts.
A person with ADHD can't maintain consistent workout habits — fitness apps assume neurotypical motivation and fail to account for executive dysfunction and variable energy.
Seniors and their families can't find trustworthy in-home care — existing agencies are expensive, unvetted, and don't match caregivers to specific needs.
Searching for a simple tool that captures quick tasks and thoughts on the go without switching apps, and organizes them automatically.
Searching for a legal review tool that explains important clauses and potential risks in contracts, using AI that works across different jurisdictions
Entrepreneurs and managers spend too much time in routine meetings instead of focusing on strategic work
Dog owners can't find reliable, available dog walkers for regular walks — existing platforms have inconsistent quality, no real-time availability, and lack proper pet handling verification.
Fashion brands can't produce custom clothing at scale — MOQs are too high, lead times too long, and small brands get ignored by manufacturers.
Struggling to make a profit running an Airbnb cleaning business in NYC due to high costs, slow turnovers, and inconsistent standards across multiple properties.
Online learning platforms don't adapt to how you actually learn — everyone gets the same videos and quizzes regardless of skill level, learning pace, or comprehension style.
Buying prescription glasses online is frustrating — virtual try-on is inaccurate, PD measurement is confusing, and there's no reliable way to know how frames will fit your face.
Job seekers spend weeks applying to dozens of jobs with no response — existing platforms don't match skills to realistic opportunities or help optimize applications.
